hooks.prompt:
Turn Navigator plugin is active. Show the user a compact keybinding table:

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Shift+↑ | Previous turn |
| Shift+↓ | Next turn |
| Alt+↑ | Up 5 turns |
| Alt+↓ | Down 5 turns |
| Ctrl+G | Jump to bottom |
| q | Exit browse mode |

Keep it to just the table, no extra explanation. Add a note: requires tmux.
